Graphical abstract
Electrical conductivity and Self-healing
Journal Pre-proofs
Highlights
• A method from commercially available sources is reported to obtain functional
• The tensile strength and toughness of the gel are 18.0 MPa and 42.3 MJ/m $ ^{3
• The gel is self-healable and conductive
- This hydrogel might find applications as a biocompatible and bioactive materia
